tweets.text:
The most important conversations in fintech aren't happening at conferences: they're going on behind the scenes in small rooms with the right people.

Join us June 11 to hear from folks directly disrupting the industry: Victor Cardenas Codriansky (CEO, Slash) and Isaiah N. Granet (CEO, Bland), along with a special guest for a candid panel on AI in financial services, will talk what's changing, what the challenges are, and what it takes to actually deploy in a regulated industry.

Stay after the panel for a networking hour with drinks and bites!

Spots are limited, register here: https://t.co/SWprOPlmcp

profile_bio.description: Bland is the platform for AI phone calling. Build, test, and scale AI phone agents, and integrate with our API. Get started at https://t.co/xKQ75kUiHT

value.string_value: After replacing their call center with AI voice agents, American Way Health increased transfer rates from 25% to 45%, unlocking millions in additional revenue.
The insurance company that added $430M by automating their calls

tweets.text:
Norm for iMessage is here. 🔵

Norm lets you get anything done in Bland via text. It can fix your pathways, run tests, pull reports, and send daily reminders.

Want to see how it works? Text 1-321-424-0172 and tell Norm to build you a phone agent.

Book a demo if you want to see how you can build your own iMessage agents in Bland. https://t.co/rMdxnv8Xtw

The most important conversations in fintech aren't happening at conferences: they're going on behind the scenes in small rooms with the right people.

Join us June 11 to hear from folks directly disrupting the industry: Victor Cardenas Codriansky (CEO, Slash) and Isaiah N. Granet (CEO, Bland), along with a special guest for a candid panel on AI in financial services, will talk what's changing, what the challenges are, and what it takes to actually deploy in a regulated industry.

Stay after the panel for a networking hour with drinks and bites!

Spots are limited, register here: https://t.co/SWprOPlmcp

value.string_value: After replacing their call center with AI voice agents, American Way Health increased transfer rates from 25% to 45%, unlocking millions in additional revenue.
The insurance company that added $430M by automating their calls

tweets.text:
Norm for iMessage is here. 🔵

Norm lets you get anything done in Bland via text. It can fix your pathways, run tests, pull reports, and send daily reminders.

Want to see how it works? Text 1-321-424-0172 and tell Norm to build you a phone agent.

Book a demo if you want to see how you can build your own iMessage agents in Bland. https://t.co/rMdxnv8Xtw
